name: Whispers of Discontent
description: Around the campfire, hushed voices speak of the hardship and the distance still ahead. A few settlers stare longingly back at the last valley. No action is needed yet, but the mood is shifting.

name: Restless Sleep
description: During the night, arguments break out over trivial matters. Blankets are tossed, and a handful of settlers mutter about leaving. The caravan's unity trembles, but the dawn brings a fragile calm.

name: Fireside Grumbling
description: A group of travellers complains loudly about the constant marching and the lack of a permanent home. Their words sow doubt among the younger settlers. The leader's gaze alone keeps them in line for now.

name: The Settler's Doubt
description: An elderly settler, respected by many, questions whether the caravan will ever find a true haven. Her words hang heavy in the air. The caravan continues, but the seed of doubt is planted.

name: Clenched Fists
description: Tempers flare over a perceived unfair distribution of tools. Pushing and shoving stop short of violence, but the atmosphere is tense. The caravan's heart beats a little faster tonight.

name: The Call of the Last Oasis
description: A faction of settlers insists the previous site was better than any we'll find. They demand to turn back and settle there, threatening to break off.

effects.message: {delta} settlers leave the caravan, convinced the last valley was their true home.
It takes impassioned speeches and shared rations, but the dissenters stay. Unity drops by {delta}%.

name: Fork in the Road
description: A persuasive group claims the path behind offered richer land. They demand a vote to go back. The caravan's decision is stark: let them leave or burn precious unity to hold the line.

effects.message: {delta} settlers turn back, taking their supplies with them. The caravan grows smaller.
Heated debates and concessions cost the caravan dearly. Unity erodes by {delta}%.

name: Rough Tinkering
description: A restless crowd, searching for answers, accidentally floods the terrain scanner with chaotic signals, damaging its sensitivity.

effects.message: The terrain scanner is damaged by {delta}%. Precious precision lost.

name: Storm of Nervous Hands
description: Anxiety drives settlers to fiddle with the weather instruments, hoping to find a forecast of a promised land. The delicate sensors are mishandled.

effects.message: The atmospheric scanner suffers a {delta}% calibration loss. Storms may now come without warning.

name: A Fatal Brawl
description: Tempers flare into a violent scuffle over remaining supplies. Before order is restored, blood is spilled and trust is shattered.

effects.message: Unity crumbles by {delta}% as fear takes hold.
